svg.title: If You Ask — app icon source
svg.desc: Hand-of-cards icon for the If You Ask iOS/Android app. Three category cards fanning from a hand-held pivot point below the canvas — gold (Wait What?) at the back, green (Just Vibing) in the middle, terracotta (Dig Deep) just behind a blank white question card layered on top as the fourth card in the fan. Cream background. 1024x1024 square canvas, no rounded corners (iOS applies the mask automatically).
